metadata.description: Edge references a target concept ('DatabaseAdapter') that does not appear in the concepts list. Only 'UserRepository' is defined. Fails the referential_integrity Level 1 check.

concepts.name: UserRepository
concepts.description: Provides CRUD operations for user profile records stored in Supabase, translating between the Supabase SDK response format and the internal UserProfile Pydantic model. Enforces row-level security by always scoping queries to the authenticated user's ID.
